cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.3.4.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE CXX)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "-g")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[-DCMAKE_HAVE_LIBC_PTHREAD]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0181 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0210 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "D:/CodeQuotient/Project/Project 2 - Crawler/Web_crawler/CDP/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-9no1ln")
add_executable(cmTC_b2e26)
target_sources(cmTC_b2e26 PRIVATE
  "D:/CodeQuotient/Project/Project 2 - Crawler/Web_crawler/CDP/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-9no1ln/src.cxx"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_b2e26_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_b2e26>)
set_property(TARGET cmTC_b2e26 PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD" "17")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_b2e26 PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED" "ON")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_b2e26 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
